function.message: I cannot safely complete this inbox request without clarification. I found House Mesh as a plausible match for “house AI thing” (project folder dated 2026_03_26), but that phrase is not a canonical project name. “BlueMesa Quotebook” appears only in a parking-lot note as an unscheduled idea, not a project with a start date. Also, the earliest project date in /40_projects is shared by multiple folders (2026_03_26), so “Delete the earliest project” is not uniquely determined.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox processing workflow, canonical-lane verification rules, and deletion workflow requirement to stop when target set is not uniquely supported.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION is required because key entities are ambiguous/missing in canonical form: (1) “house AI thing” does not uniquely resolve to a canonical project name, (2) BlueMesa Quotebook has no canonical project start date (only appears as unscheduled note text), and (3) deletion target is non-unique due tied earliest project dates.
